query: SELECT id, location, reportType, reportDate, totalScore, status, createdAt, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submitterName') as submitter_name FROM report_submissions WHERE location LIKE '%ackay%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3M4hPncfDS8MBAb.4e1326b24a82 --database i5zcri4CVdStBBckDWTaVK --execute SELECT id, location, reportType, reportDate, totalScore, status, createdAt, JSON_EXTRACT(data, '$.submitterName') as submitter_name FROM report_submissions WHERE location LIKE '%ackay%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
